creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
> This sounds me not a good idea. It supposedly be unreasonable to 
 > [remove] existing patches
 
 I don't know the etiquette or policy about this, but the patches that
 would be sent the attic by my suggestion are tiny:
 
 -rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   251 Feb 21 08:57 patch-ab
 -rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   226 Feb 21 08:57 patch-ac
 
 > It should be better adding new patches only for theme files in one 
 > patch and saving existing patches.
 > 
 > Following patch is an example based on this thought. Please review 
 > this. 
 
 It looks and works fine.
 __
 Trevor Johnson
